creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
There is a limit of one WWW on pkg-descr.  You can't have two.

https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/porting-desc.html

From what I can tell, the current WWW is still correct since MASTER_SITES points to it and the second WWW is just metadata about the port.

Also, having a version in pkg-descr is not done, because versions change. 

So I need reject the new WWW and change the first line to remove the version.  The comment change is ok.

Agree?
